## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Behavior is implemented.
- [ ] Jobs are idempotent and resumable where applicable.
- [ ] Provenance and source metadata are preserved.
- [ ] YAML / JSON contracts validate.
- [ ] Unit and integration tests pass.
- [ ] Documentation is updated.
